title: Saeima moves forward weapons ban for dual Russian, Belarusian citizens
summary_full: On Thursday, April 30, the Saeima approved in the first reading amendments to the Weapons Law drafted by the opposition National Alliance, which would prohibit the issuance of firearms permits to Latvian citizens who are also citizens of Russia or Belarus, as well as to create a legal basis for revoking permits that have already been issued.
